{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322043154D6BA4A3C2E95DC420824"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619170165057635134","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"开篇还行，后面矿坑这块写的不错，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773979489,"group_id":"7604508340365823000","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4mzSNFj85EjHuL88QfPuuWXoUcsuBxBeeqkGsTP1MML","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"3527650211009716","user_name":"哼区区的冰玉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3527650211009716","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1682695639,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7604508340365823000","book_info":{"abstract":"日子过得太快了，快到一个普通人连失败都来不及复盘…

电商公司倒了，老板破产，林峥失业。
手里只剩几万块赔偿金，在深市连喘气都要算成本。
直到某天，他在河边甩了一竿——

【检测到新鱼种】
【重量突破：结算现金+积分】
【积分可兑换鱼具、鱼饵、强化药剂、技能书、杆法心法】

从此以后，钓到的不只是鱼，还是房租、饭钱和重新站起来的底气。
但系统只认一条规则：同种鱼，只有新重量，才算数。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/380bba2d5fa8fb98f44772049f3eb2f9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"酒香粥甜","author_id":"","book_id":"7604508340365823000","book_name":"失业后，我靠钓鱼爆护回血","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605399903371526681","read_count":"159","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"99441"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"38","tags":"都市日常,钓鱼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/380bba2d5fa8fb98f44772049f3eb2f9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309114&x-signature=3gVNlOfKi1DR8Q2AiVGNaNBlZGQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2948239548230096","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"104"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322043154D6BA4A3C2E95DC420824"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4715,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7604508340365823000","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status
